description_long: This is a modern, L-shaped cabinet or shelf unit featuring a combination of white and wood-textured surfaces. The structure consists of a larger horizontal base section and a shorter vertical section, both with flat surfaces suitable for storage or display. The wood-textured panels are likely laminate or veneer, providing a warm contrast to the smooth white frame. The unit appears to have several doors or panels, possibly concealing storage compartments. Its design is sleek and minimal, with clean lines and no visible hardware, suggesting a contemporary aesthetic. The overall build looks sturdy, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped cabinet or shelf with white and wood-textured surfaces, featuring clean lines and concealed storage compartments. The design is sleek and minimal, suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the depth of the wood-textured section protruding from the white frame.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the L-shaped layout, wood-textured panels, and the main storage surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the white frame and the thinness of the structure from this angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain white back panel with minimal visible features.
